name: Misinterpretation of Input
description: The product misinterprets input in a security-relevant way, processing data under incorrect assumptions about its format, encoding, or meaning, leading to unexpected and potentially exploitable behavior.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides data in one format or encoding that a TRANSFORM or CONTROL node interprets under a different assumption (e.g., treating binary as text, misreading length fields, confusing data types), causing a semantic mismatch that bypasses security logic
